title: Proof by Contradiction
description: A failed debunk tells you what the mix is NOT. Use that, plus the other clues, to nail down the answer.

hints.text: The failed master debunk tells you the true mix of ingredients 2 and 7 is NOT G+. The aspect clue pins ingredient 2's Blue component. Together these narrow down which alchemical ingredient 2 can be.

Ingredient 2 has B+. The mixing clue says mix(2,3) = B+. Ingredient 4 is alchemical NNN (all Large Negative). The failure clue eliminates any world where mix(ing2, ing7) = G+, which rules out alchemicals where G components match across ingredients 2 and 7.
Ingredient 2's B+ and the mix(2,3)=B+ clue significantly constrain ingredient 3. The failure on mix(2,7) eliminates the remaining ambiguity. In all consistent worlds, mix(2,4) = G−.
